title: Segment
description: A single business or geographic segment data point for a company.

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.

metric.description: The segment metric (SALES, OPINC, ASSETS, DEP, CAPEX).

label.description: Report labels of the segment type requested.

date.description: Date for the period requested in YYYY-MM-DD format.

value.description: Segment metric value. May be a number or string.
